block_00: 42 trading tournaments with a total prize pool of $34,500! Jump in!
block_06: We are starting a great series of tournaments in the region of Latin America! Try your hand at a trading battle!
block_07: 16 countries will face off in 42 trading tournaments with a total prize pool of $34,500! But only the two strongest countries will make it to the final to share $5,000 in the Ultimate Championship!
block_11: Each country faces off with another country in every round match. Each tournament has five winners, the country that took the majority of winning positions goes to the next round in the Winners Bracket, while the loser country gets to the Losers Bracket to try its luck there and take one more chance to get to the final.
block_12: Please note, that you can only sign up for the tournaments where your country participates.
block_13: Get acquainted with the schedule and jump in to win prizes!👇
block_36: All participating traders start the tournament with the same tournament balance. The prize pool is fixed for every tournament.
block_37: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
